name: branding-pitch
description: Pitch a brand end-to-end — analyze its visual DNA, generate an AI photography + video campaign (~6 images + 2 videos) with proper reference-image + still-first-then-animate consistency patterns, build a polished editorial landing page, served locally. Composes Krea.ai (nano-banana-pro, nano-banana-flash, kling-2.5, seedance, hailuo-2.3) with Anthropic's frontend-design plugin and the impeccable typeset/polish/critique skills.
